text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. Treasury Secretary Bessent reports that the U.S. has targeted Iran's shadow banking infrastructure, access to crypto currencies, shadow fleet, and weapons procurement networks as part of the ongoing Economic Fury. He assess that oil storage and export facilities on Kharg Island will soon be reaching storage capacity, forcing Iran to reduce oil production. This will result in Iran losing $170 million a day in revenues. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国财政部长贝森特报告称，作为“经济愤怒”行动的一部分，美国已针对伊朗的影子银行基础设施、加密货币访问权限、影子船队以及武器采购网络进行了打击。他评估认为，哈尔克岛上的石油储存和出口设施很快将达到储存容量上限，迫使伊朗减少石油产量。这将导致伊朗每天损失 1.7 亿美元的收入。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 NYT: The U.S. military has significantly increased attacks on suspected drug-trafficking boats in the Caribbean Sea and eastern Pacific this month, with a the lastest strike on Sunday bringing the total number of strikes to 54 since the campaign started in September. The military has quietly expanded the use of fixed-wing attack aircraft and MQ-9 Reaper drones operating from bases in El Salvador and Puerto Rico, allowing a faster tempo of strikes. One official said suspected smuggling boats previously had around a 50 percent chance of evading interception, but that figure has now reportedly fallen to 25 percent. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 《纽约时报》：本月，美国军方大幅增加了对加勒比海和东太平洋疑似贩毒船只的打击力度，周日的最新一次打击使自9月行动开始以来的总打击次数达到54次。军方已悄然扩大了从萨尔瓦多和波多黎各基地起飞的固定翼攻击机和MQ-9“死神”无人机的使用，从而加快了打击节奏。一位官员表示，疑似走私船只此前约有50%的几率躲避拦截，但据报道，这一数字现已降至25%。@wfwitness

text: Open Source Intel How it’s supposed to go: President Trump is scheduled to meet Xi Jinping in Beijing on May 14 to May 15. Operation Economic Fury will be at full throttle. That is when we should start seeing the early real effects on the regime’s pockets. After the Trump Xi meeting, Operation Epic Fury could resume again. If the IRGC decides to do something reckless between now and then, the summit could be canceled and Epic Fury resumes. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 事情本该如此：特朗普总统计划于5月14日至5月15日在北京会见习近平。届时“经济愤怒行动”将全速推进。那时我们应该开始看到对该政权财政的初步实际影响。在特朗普与习近平会晤后，“史诗愤怒行动”可能会再次恢复。如果伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队在此期间决定采取鲁莽行动，峰会可能会被取消，“史诗愤怒行动”将随之恢复。推文

text: WarMonitor RT @BrendanKeefe : Son & I went to a national park in January & asked to buy the $80 annual pass. Rangers said they were ordered to throw out all the hard passes b/c they didn't have Trump's photo on them (yet). Had to buy online & rangers printed a temp pass. This came in the mail a month later. https://twitter.com/BrendanKeefe/status/2049199099979682014/photo/1 SCOOP — The State Department is unveiling a limited-edition passport redesign for America250 featuring images of Donald Trump, the Declaration of Independence and the founding fathers. Take a look: https://twitter.com/Katelyn_Caralle/status/2049170808300298629/photo/1 - Katelyn Caralle tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 转推 @BrendanKeefe ：一月份我和儿子去了一个国家公园，想买80美元的年度通行证。护林员说他们接到命令扔掉所有硬质通行证，因为上面（还没）印有特朗普的照片。不得不在线购买，护林员打印了一张临时通行证。这张通行证一个月后寄到了。https://twitter.com/BrendanKeefe/status/2049199099979682014/photo/1 独家新闻 — 美国国务院正在发布一款限量版美国250周年纪念护照重新设计方案，上面印有唐纳德·特朗普、独立宣言和开国元勋的图像。请看：https://twitter.com/Katelyn_Caralle/status/2049170808300298629/photo/1 - Katelyn Caralle 推文

text: WarMonitor RT @kylegriffin1 : BREAKING: Trump's FCC chief, Brendan Carr, has just ordered a review of all station licenses owned by ABC — an extraordinary move to pressure a TV network whose programming has angered Trump. The news comes after both Donald and Melania called for the firing of Jimmy Kimmel. tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 转推 @kylegriffin1 ：突发新闻：特朗普的联邦通信委员会主席布伦丹·卡尔刚刚下令审查美国广播公司（ABC）拥有的所有电台执照 — 这是一项非同寻常的举措，旨在向一家因节目内容激怒特朗普的电视网施压。此前，唐纳德和梅拉尼娅都曾呼吁解雇吉米·坎摩尔。推文

text: WarMonitor U.S. spy agencies were asked to assess how Iran would react if Trump declared victory and backed down. Early assessments found Tehran would likely see a drawdown as an Iranian victory. (Reuters) https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2049277483930062859/photo/1 tweet

text: A bank robber, a bishop on an oil field, and a government-in-exile offering the CIA free operations in exchange for independence. This is not a religious conflict, this is a resource war with a gospel soundtrack. Read our latest in the original DDGeopolitics investigative series: THE "SPIES" WHO CRIED GENOCIDE: PART 4 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: WarMonitor Fetterman was the only Democrat to side with Republicans, while Susan Collins and Rand Paul were the only Republicans to break ranks. They own whatever happens next. NEW: The U.S. Senate voted 51–47 to reject a resolution that would’ve blocked Trump from launching a military strike on Cuba without congressional approval. Trump has repeatedly said in recent months that “Cuba is next” after Venezuela and Iran. https://twitter.com/RpsAgainstTrump/status/2049268700667101383/photo/1 - Republicans against Trump tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 费特曼是唯一支持共和党人的民主党人，而苏珊·柯林斯和兰德·保罗是仅有的两位打破党派立场的共和党人。接下来发生的一切都由他们负责。最新消息：美国参议院以 51 票对 47 票否决了一项决议，该决议本可以阻止特朗普在未经国会批准的情况下对古巴发动军事打击。特朗普近几个月来多次表示，继委内瑞拉和伊朗之后，“下一个就是古巴”。https://twitter.com/RpsAgainstTrump/status/2049268700667101383/photo/1 - 反对特朗普的共和党人推文

text: ⚡️ 🇨🇦 🇺🇸 Canadian Defence Minister McGuinty explains why Canada purchase of 88 F-35s is still under review. Reporter: "Why is the m 35 contract still under review? Like, it's been under review for months. What's the holdup on this?” McGuinty: “It's a really important analysis that we're conducting. It's one of the largest procurements in Canadian history. Obviously, it speaks to industrial benefits. It speaks to buy Canadian provisions. Speaks to jobs. It speaks to investment. It speaks to subcontracting. It speaks to all kinds of issues that are important for us." @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇨🇦 🇺🇸 加拿大国防部长麦金蒂解释了为何加拿大购买 88 架 F-35 战机的计划仍在审查中。记者：“为什么 F-35 合同仍在审查中？这已经审查好几个月了。到底在拖延什么？”麦金蒂：“我们正在进行非常重要的分析。这是加拿大历史上最大的采购项目之一。显然，这涉及工业利益。涉及购买加拿大产品的条款。涉及就业。涉及投资。涉及分包。涉及我们关心的各种问题。”@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇬🇧 U.S. President Trump welcomes British King Charles III and Queen Camilla to the White House. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇬🇧 The U.S. Space Force took part in the honor guard of an official state visit for the first time, participating in ceremonies for King Charles III. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇬🇧 美国总统特朗普在白宫欢迎英国国王查尔斯三世和卡米拉王后。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇬🇧 美国太空军首次参与国事访问的仪仗队，参加了查尔斯三世国王的仪式。@wfwitness

text: 🇺🇸 🤡 State Department to release limited edition ‘America250’ passports with Trump’s face The State Department is rolling out a limited edition U.S. passport design featuring President Donald Trump’s face on the inside cover and other images to celebrate the country’s 250th anniversary of independence. Previews of the commemorative passport show Trump’s portrait overlaid on the Declaration of Independence on the inside cover with his signature in gold, as well as a page with an image of the founding fathers signing the Declaration of Independence. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🤡 美国国务院将发布印有特朗普头像的“美国250”限量版护照。美国国务院正在推出一款限量版美国护照设计，内页封面上印有唐纳德·特朗普总统的头像及其他图像，以庆祝美国独立250周年。纪念护照的预览显示，内页封面上特朗普的肖像叠加在《独立宣言》之上，并配有他的金色签名，此外还有一页印有开国元勋签署《独立宣言》的图像。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Today Israel killed at least: - 5 Lebanese women - 3 children and a fetus - 3 civil defense medical workers This excludes the elderly men and innocent teens. This is the ceasefire that is ongoing in Lebanon May everyone who is silent about this Jewish crime be punished here before the hereafter The photos shows: Martyrs of the Jibchit massacre in the overnight airstrike: Hajj Mohammad Jawad Bahja and his wife Hajja Latifa Amani Jaber, her daughter Mariam Hilal Bahja, and her son, the child Ali Al-Rida Hilal Bahja
text_zh: 今天以色列至少杀害了：- 5名黎巴嫩妇女 - 3名儿童和一名胎儿 - 3名民防医务人员 这还不包括老年男性和无辜的青少年。这就是黎巴嫩目前正在进行的“停火”。愿所有对这一犹太罪行保持沉默的人在来世之前先在此受到惩罚。照片显示：吉布奇特（Jibchit）大屠杀中隔夜空袭的烈士：哈吉·穆罕默德·贾瓦德·巴贾（Hajj Mohammad Jawad Bahja）及其妻子哈贾·拉蒂法·阿马尼·贾贝尔（Hajja Latifa Amani Jaber）、她的女儿玛丽亚姆·希拉尔·巴贾（Mariam Hilal Bahja）以及她的儿子，儿童阿里·里达·希拉尔·巴贾（Ali Al-Rida Hilal Bahja）

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) Significant fire in the Ukrainian port city of Izmail located in Ukraine's Odesa Oblast due to Russian strikes with Shahed/Geran-type long-range strike drones tonight. The attack is ongoing. https://twitter.com/Archer83Able/status/2049265475855540352/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Status-6（战争与军事新闻）今晚，由于俄罗斯使用“见证者”（Shahed）/“天竺葵”（Geran）型远程攻击无人机进行打击，位于乌克兰敖德萨州的伊兹梅尔港口城市发生严重火灾。袭击仍在持续。https://twitter.com/Archer83Able/status/2049265475855540352/photo/1 推文

text: WarMonitor Putting the leader’s face on everything is a hallmark of authoritarian cult-of-personality regimes, from Stalin’s Soviet Union to North Korea’s Kim dynasty, where portraits appear on homes, schools, government buildings, posters, flags, currency, statues, and propaganda. Trump has now put his face or name on all of the following in his second term: — Passports — National Parks Passes — Trump Gold Cards — Trump class battleships — The Trump Kennedy Center for Performing Arts — TrumpRx — Trump’s signature on US paper currency — Gold coins from the Commission of Fine Arts — The Department of Justice — The Donald J Trump Institute of Peace — The Department of Labor — Trump accounts — The Department of Agriculture - Headquarters tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 将领导人的头像印在所有事物上是威权主义个人崇拜政权的标志，从斯大林的苏联到朝鲜的金氏王朝，肖像出现在住宅、学校、政府大楼、海报、旗帜、货币、雕像和宣传品上。特朗普在第二个任期内已将他的头像或名字印在以下所有事物上：— 护照 — 国家公园通行证 — 特朗普金卡 — 特朗普级战列舰 — 特朗普肯尼迪表演艺术中心 — TrumpRx — 特朗普在美国纸币上的签名 — 美术委员会发行的金币 — 司法部 — 唐纳德·J·特朗普和平研究所 — 劳工部 — 特朗普账户 — 农业部总部 推文

text: Open Source Intel The U.S. Senate voted down a measure that sought to bar President Trump from launching military action against Cuba without congressional approval. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2049263917067608346/photo/1 tweet

text: Open Source Intel RT @Osint613 : BREAKING 🔴 The United Arab Emirates, OPEC’s 3rd largest oil producer, announced it will leave OPEC and OPEC+ effective May 1. The move would free the UAE from cartel production quotas, allowing it to pump oil at full capacity, set its own export strategy and price crude without group restrictions. That could pave the way for higher UAE output, stronger state revenues and downward pressure on global oil prices. Lower prices and increased supply would likely be welcomed by President Trump, who has long criticized OPEC production limits and called for cheaper energy. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 转发 @Osint613 ：突发 🔴 欧佩克（OPEC）第三大石油生产国阿拉伯联合酋长国宣布，将于5月1日起退出欧佩克及欧佩克+。此举将使阿联酋摆脱卡特尔的生产配额，允许其满负荷开采石油、制定自己的出口战略，并在不受集团限制的情况下为原油定价。这可能为阿联酋提高产量、增加国家收入以及对全球油价施加下行压力铺平道路。价格下跌和供应增加可能会受到特朗普总统的欢迎，他长期以来一直批评欧佩克的生产限制，并呼吁降低能源价格。推文

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) RT @NatashaBertrand : "An Israeli military battalion that assaulted and detained a CNN team in the occupied West Bank has been redeployed after a one-month suspension, an Israeli security source told CNN.... Police have not yet released any findings or disciplinary measures following a military police investigation. The soldier who assaulted the CNN photojournalist has not faced any additional known suspension or disciplinary measures." via @OrenCNN https://www.cnn.com/2026/04/28/middleeast/israel-military-detained-cnn-team-redeployed-latam-intl tweet
text_zh: Status-6（战争与军事新闻）转发 @NatashaBertrand ：“据一位以色列安全消息人士告诉CNN，一个在被占领的西岸袭击并拘留CNN团队的以色列军事营在停职一个月后已被重新部署……在军事警察调查后，警方尚未发布任何调查结果或纪律处分措施。袭击CNN摄影记者的士兵没有面临任何已知的额外停职或纪律处分。” via @OrenCNN https://www.cnn.com/2026/04/28/middleeast/israel-military-detained-cnn-team-redeployed-latam-intl 推文

text: Disclose.tv NEW - U.S. Senate votes to reject a resolution to block Trump from launching a U.S. military strike on Cuba, 51-47 — AP tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv 最新消息 —— 美国参议院以51票对47票否决了一项阻止特朗普对古巴发动军事打击的决议 —— 美联社 推文

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇵🇦 🇨🇳 🇧🇴 🇨🇷 🇬🇾 🇵🇾 🇹🇹 The United States, Bolivia, Costa Rica, Guyana, Paraguay, and Trinidad and Tobago issued a joint statement backing Panama’s sovereignty, citing concerns over China’s economic pressure and actions affecting Panama-flagged vessels. They said any attempt to undermine Panama’s sovereignty threatens regional security. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇵🇦 🇨🇳 🇧🇴 🇨🇷 🇬🇾 🇵🇾 🇹🇹 美国、玻利维亚、哥斯达黎加、圭亚那、巴拉圭以及特立尼达和多巴哥发表联合声明，支持巴拿马的主权，并对中国施加的经济压力以及影响巴拿马籍船只的行为表示关切。他们表示，任何破坏巴拿马主权的企图都会威胁地区安全。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 Lebanon’s representative at the UN Security Council: Israel is currently working to undermine Washington’s efforts to reduce escalation and reach sustainable peaceful solutions, and Lebanon will no longer accept others’ wars on its territory, their projects, or the continued attacks against it @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 黎巴嫩驻联合国安理会代表：以色列目前正致力于破坏华盛顿为减少局势升级和达成可持续和平解决方案所做的努力，黎巴嫩将不再接受他人在其领土上进行的战争、他们的项目，或针对黎巴嫩的持续袭击 @wfwitness

text: Nuno Felix RT @ErinBanco : SCOOP: US intel agencies have been asked to analyze how Iran would react if Trump were to declare victory and back away from military operations w/ @G_Slattery https://www.reuters.com/world/us/us-spy-agencies-examine-how-iran-would-react-trump-declaring-victory-2026-04-28/ tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 转发 @ErinBanco : 独家：美国情报机构已被要求分析如果特朗普宣布胜利并退出军事行动，伊朗将如何反应 w/ @G_Slattery https://www.reuters.com/world/us/us-spy-agencies-examine-how-iran-would-react-trump-declaring-victory-2026-04-28/ 推文

text: Open Source Intel The White House sent a memo to Capitol Hill saying Congress must “immediately fund DHS” before the administration can no longer pay tens of thousands of employees, Punchbowl reports. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 据 Punchbowl 报道，白宫向国会山发送了一份备忘录，称国会必须“立即为国土安全部提供资金”，否则政府将无法支付数万名员工的工资。 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to OSINT Nuno Felix You are going to appreciate this one @Mpolymer 👇 A VERY important piece today in Israel’s Ynet by Nahum Barnea & Ronen Bergman on the botched regime change plan in the Iran war. It confirms regime change was “the heart of the plan,” with Netanyahu and the Mossad driving it and Trump on board: decapitate the leadership, foment protests, and back a Kurdish incursion from the west. What stands out most is the admission of how central Israeli influence ops in Iran became. Under Mossad chief Barnea, in recent years shaping Iranian public opinion shifted to a core priority, “driving influence moves” inside Iran and effectively turning it into a “weapons system” with effects “far beyond social media.” The strategy was explicit: topple from above and below, “lean on senior officials” while “fostering mass protest and armed resistance of minorities,” in "parallel." "The organization" for this op "began four years ago," the piece states, and "reached operational maturity two and a half years ago." The piece also acknowledges “immense” Israeli work in the “background” of the January protests, which were met with a violent crackdown killing thousands by Iranian authorities, who portrayed them as foreign-backed. The regime change war was itself was advanced because of these protests. The war was originally slated for June but expedited as conditions seemed to “ripen.” Yet it didn’t bear out to say the least. No mass uprising. No collapse. The regime “restored command and control” and survived what planners evidently thought would end it within days. Even more striking, the piece says the US was caught off guard by Iran’s Hormuz closure in part because Trump seemingly believed “the war would end within three days.” (!) The Kurdish component is especially revealing. It reflects a fundamental misreading of Iran’s internal dynamics, where an externally backed incursion involving separatist groups would more likely have triggered a nationalist backlash and unified much of the country against a perceived partition threat, rather than spurred mass uprising. In their own telling, Israel invested heavily in influence operation in Iran, fomenting unrest, and regime decapitation, but the core assumption that the system would collapse proved false. Now, after all this, the US is back to negotiations, with the goal of a likely narrower deal focused just on the nuclear file and sanctions relief. The piece ends with: “What started as a far-reaching Israeli move, rich in imagination, final in its solution, ends in heartache.” Link: https://www.ynet.co.il/news/article/yokra14748698#google_vignette - Sina Toossi tweet
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 OSINT Nuno Felix 你会喜欢这一篇 @Mpolymer 👇 今天以色列 Ynet 刊登了 Nahum Barnea 和 Ronen Bergman 的一篇非常重要的文章，关于伊朗战争中失败的政权更迭计划。它证实了政权更迭是“计划的核心”，由内塔尼亚胡和摩萨德推动，特朗普也参与其中：斩首领导层，煽动抗议，并从西部支持库尔德人的入侵。最引人注目的是他们承认以色列在伊朗的影响力行动变得多么核心。在摩萨德局长 Barnea 的领导下，近年来塑造伊朗公众舆论已成为核心优先事项，在伊朗内部“推动影响力行动”，并有效地将其变成一种“武器系统”，其影响“远超社交媒体”。该策略很明确：从上到下推翻，在“施压高级官员”的同时“并行”地“培养大规模抗议和少数民族的武装抵抗”。文章指出，该行动的“组织”始于四年前，并于两年半前“达到作战成熟度”。文章还承认以色列在 1 月份抗议活动的“背景”中做了“巨大的”工作，这些抗议活动遭到了伊朗当局的暴力镇压，造成数千人死亡，伊朗当局将其描述为外国支持的。政权更迭战争本身就是因为这些抗议活动而提前进行的。战争原定于 6 月进行，但由于情况似乎“成熟”而提前了。然而，至少可以说，结果并不理想。没有大规模起义。没有崩溃。政权“恢复了指挥和控制”，并在策划者显然认为几天内就会结束的行动中幸存下来。更令人震惊的是，文章称美国对伊朗关闭霍尔木兹海峡感到措手不及，部分原因是特朗普似乎认为“战争将在三天内结束”。（！）库尔德人的部分尤其具有启发性。它反映了对伊朗内部动态的根本性误读，即涉及分裂主义团体的外部支持入侵更有可能引发民族主义反弹，并使该国大部分地区团结起来反对感知到的分裂威胁，而不是引发大规模起义。按照他们自己的说法，以色列在伊朗的影响力行动、煽动动乱和政权斩首上投入了巨资，但系统会崩溃的核心假设被证明是错误的。现在，在经历了这一切之后，美国回到了谈判桌前，目标是达成一项可能更狭窄的协议，仅专注于核档案和制裁减免。文章结尾写道：“以一个富有想象力、解决方案最终的深远以色列行动开始，却以心碎告终。” 链接：https://www.ynet.co.il/news/article/yokra14748698#google_vignette - Sina Toossi 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to OSINT Nuno Felix RT @SinaToossi : 👇 A VERY important piece today in Israel’s Ynet by Nahum Barnea & Ronen Bergman on the botched regime change plan in the Iran war. It confirms regime change was “the heart of the plan,” with Netanyahu and the Mossad driving it and Trump on board: decapitate the leadership, foment protests, and back a Kurdish incursion from the west. What stands out most is the admission of how central Israeli influence ops in Iran became. Under Mossad chief Barnea, in recent years shaping Iranian public opinion shifted to a core priority, “driving influence moves” inside Iran and effectively turning it into a “weapons system” with effects “far beyond social media.” The strategy was explicit: topple from above and below, “lean on senior officials” while “fostering mass protest and armed resistance of minorities,” in "parallel." "The organization" for this op "began four years ago," the piece states, and "reached operational maturity two and a half years ago." The piece also acknowledges “immense” Israeli work in the “background” of the January protests, which were met with a violent crackdown killing thousands by Iranian authorities, who portrayed them as foreign-backed. The regime change war was itself was advanced because of these protests. The war was originally slated for June but expedited as conditions seemed to “ripen.” Yet it didn’t bear out to say the least. No mass uprising. No collapse. The regime “restored command and control” and survived what planners evidently thought would end it within days. Even more striking, the piece says the US was caught off guard by Iran’s Hormuz closure in part because Trump seemingly believed “the war would end within three days.” (!) The Kurdish component is especially revealing. It reflects a fundamental misreading of Iran’s internal dynamics, where an externally backed incursion involving separatist groups would more likely have triggered a nationalist backlash and unified much of the country against a perceived partition threat, rather than spurred mass uprising. In their own telling, Israel invested heavily in influence operation in Iran, fomenting unrest, and regime decapitation, but the core assumption that the system would collapse proved false. Now, after all this, the US is back to negotiations, with the goal of a likely narrower deal focused just on the nuclear file and sanctions relief. The piece ends with: “What started as a far-reaching Israeli move, rich in imagination, final in its solution, ends in heartache.” Link: https://www.ynet.co.il/news/article/yokra14748698#google_vignette tweet

text: OSINTtechnical Russia’s Tuapse oil refinery continues to suffer a catastrophic fire almost 24 hours after it was targeted by a Ukrainian drone raid. https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2049255994430050555/video/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTtechnical 俄罗斯图阿普谢炼油厂在遭到乌克兰无人机袭击近 24 小时后，仍遭受灾难性火灾。 https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2049255994430050555/video/1 推文

text: Nuno Felix Don’t start things you cannot finish I usually reason when responding, but to this post, I have nothing to say about Europeans other than they are antisemite bigots. Spain's imports of Russian gas (under global sanctions) hit record hight, but EU judges Israel if it imports Russian grains (not under sanctions). - Hussain Abdul-Hussain tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 不要开始你无法完成的事情。我通常在回应时讲道理，但对于这篇文章，除了说欧洲人是反犹太主义的偏执狂外，我无话可说。西班牙进口俄罗斯天然气（在全球制裁下）创下历史新高，但欧盟却在评判以色列是否进口俄罗斯谷物（不在制裁范围内）。 - Hussain Abdul-Hussain 推文

text: Nuno Felix RT @jimsciutto : New: Sen Mitch McConnell slams Pentagon for failing to spend #Ukraine aid passed by Congress: “Appropriators fully funded that authorization for fiscal 2026 with overwhelming support,” he wrote in The Washington Post. “Yet the Ukraine aid we passed months ago is now collecting dust at the Pentagon.” tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 转发 @jimsciutto : 新消息：参议员 Mitch McConnell 抨击五角大楼未能支出国会通过的 #Ukraine 援助资金：“拨款委员会在 2026 财年以压倒性支持完全资助了该授权，”他在《华盛顿邮报》上写道。“然而，我们几个月前通过的乌克兰援助资金现在正躺在五角大楼里吃灰。” 推文

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇨🇺 The U.S. Senate has voted in favour of blocking a resolution (S.J.Res. 124), aimed at blocking U.S. military intervention in Cuba with 51 in favour and 47 against @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇨🇺 美国参议院投票通过了一项旨在阻止（S.J.Res. 124）决议的动议，该决议原本旨在阻止美国对古巴进行军事干预。投票结果为51票赞成，47票反对。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇸🇾 Clashes erupted in the village of al-Duwayr in the eastern Deir ez-Zor countryside as Syrian Internal Security Forces attempted to arrest a wanted man who refused to surrender. The clashes resulted in injuries to three Internal Security Forces personnel. Syrian Internal Security Forces have sent significant reinforcements to the area, and clashes are ongoing. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇸🇾 在叙利亚代尔祖尔省东部乡村的杜韦尔村（al-Duwayr），叙利亚内部安全部队试图逮捕一名拒绝投降的通缉犯时爆发了冲突。冲突导致三名内部安全部队人员受伤。叙利亚内部安全部队已向该地区派遣了大量增援部队，冲突仍在持续。@wfwitness

text: Nuno Felix RT @ColbyBadhwar : 🇺🇸 🇬🇧 🇺🇦 King Charles recounts the long history of the US & UK fighting shoulder to shoulder, and calls for that same resolve to confront terror in supporting Ukraine. Standing ovation from Congress; even Vance gets up, following Speaker Johnson's lead. https://x.com/Archer83Able/status/2049241264843825450/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 转发 @ColbyBadhwar : 🇺🇸 🇬🇧 🇺🇦 查尔斯国王讲述了美英并肩作战的悠久历史，并呼吁以同样的决心对抗恐怖主义，支持乌克兰。国会全体起立鼓掌；甚至万斯也跟随约翰逊议长的脚步站了起来。 https://x.com/Archer83Able/status/2049241264843825450/video/1 推文

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) Russian soldier on a motorbike flips over his comrade in an attempt to evade a Ukrainian FPV drone. https://twitter.com/Archer83Able/status/2049251098754470004/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Status-6 (战争与军事新闻) 一名俄罗斯士兵在试图躲避乌克兰FPV无人机时，骑着摩托车翻倒在战友身上。 https://twitter.com/Archer83Able/status/2049251098754470004/video/1 推文
